snippet.title: Chath Par Sota Hua Raat Ko Barish AA Gayi | Village Life | #shorts #ai
snippet.description:
Aaj ki is dilchasp village story mein Sara, Hamza aur Ami Jaan garmi ki wajah se raat ko chhat par sone ka faisla karte hain. Hamza aur Sara mil kar charpaiyan aur bistar chhat par lagate hain aur sab sukoon se so jate hain. Lekin aadhi raat ko achanak barish shuru ho jati hai. Sara sab ko jagati hai aur phir poora ghar mil kar charpaiyan aur bistar bachane ke liye barish mein neeche le aata hai.

Neeche aakar Sara garma garam chai banati hai. Barish ke mausam mein poora parivaar ek saath baith kar chai peeta hai aur khoobsurat lamhe enjoy karta hai. ❤️☕🌧️

**Moral:** Ghar ki asli khushi parivaar ke saath guzare hue chhote chhote lamhon mein hoti hai.

snippet.title: The Ultimate 5-Band HF Antenna Secret! 🚀⚡ (1000KM Range)
snippet.description:
The Ultimate 5-Band HF Antenna Secret! 🚀⚡ (1000KM Range)
Kya aapko pata hai ki bina mobile tower aur internet ke hazaron kilometer door communication kaise hota hai? 😡 Mehenge satellite phones kharidna band karo! Aaj dekhiye Ham Radio operators ka Ultimate 5-Band HF Portable Antenna Blueprint jaisa ki is 1000175409.jpg image mein dikhaya gaya hai! 🚀 Is reel ka abhi SCREENSHOT le lo aur SAVE kar lo, emergency aur disaster ke waqt ye tumhari jaan bacha sakta hai!
🛠️ Is Antenna Blueprint Ke Andar Aakhir Hai Kya? (The REAL Truth):
📻 The Multiband Magic (80/40/20/15/10M): Ye normal TV antenna nahi hai. Isme alag-alag frequency bands (jahan radio waves travel karti hain) ko pakadne ke liye alag-alag length ki copper coils bani hain.
⚡ The Copper Coils (1.6mm Wire): Diagram ke mutabiq, 30mm ke PVC tube (Koker) par 1.6mm thick enameled copper wire lapeta gaya hai. 80M band ke liye 110 turns (chakkar) lagaye gaye hain, jisse ye low frequency ko easily catch kar sake.
🌍 The Base (SO-239 & Ground Radials): Niche ki taraf RG8U heavy coaxial cable connect karne ke liye SO-239 socket diya hai. Aur sabse zaroori chiz 'Ground Radials' (taar jo zameen par bichaye jate hain) signal ko reflect karke range badha dete hain!
⚙️ WARNING & PRO TIP ⚠️: Dosto, in frequencies par transmission (broadcast) karne ke liye Government se "Amateur Radio (Ham) License" lena zaroori hota hai! Bina license ke transmission karna illegal hai. Par aap as a receiver (sunne ke liye) isko bana kar free mein duniya bhar ke signals track kar sakte hain! 🛡️@SamarExperiment @TechBurner @MRINDIANHACKER @ElectroBOOM @electronicsHub @Makezine @LearnEngineering @EngineeringMindset

snippet.title: How to Do Your First POTA Activation | Beginner's Guide
snippet.description:
Thinking about trying Parks on the Air but not sure where to start?

In this video, I head out to Henlow Millennium Meadow (GB-6101) to demonstrate exactly how to complete your first POTA activation.
Using a simple and affordable setup consisting of a Xiegu G90 and a cheap telescopic whip antenna, I cover everything you'll need to know, including:
• What equipment to bring
• How to find and activate a POTA park
• How to spot yourself on the POTA website
• Making contacts and qualifying the activation
• Common beginner questions

By the end of the outing, we manage 11 contacts and successfully activate the park.
POTA is one of the most enjoyable and accessible sides of amateur radio, and hopefully this video shows that you don't need expensive equipment or years of experience to get out and have a go.

🎙️ Radio: Xiegu G90
📡 Power: 20W
🪫 Setup: Telescopic HF whip antenna
📍 Location: Henlow Millennium Meadow (GB-6101)

👉 Subscribe for more approachable amateur radio adventures!

Website: RADIOFORUS.CO.UK
Email: Tom@radioforus.co.uk
Discord: https://discord.gg/YTqnrUMDyT

#hamradio #amateurradio #POTA #ParksOnTheAir #hamradiouk #portablehamradio #QRP #HF #XieguG90

• What equipment to bring
• How to find and activate a POTA park
• How to spot yourself on the POTA website
• Making contacts and qualifying the activation
• Common beginner questions

By the end of the outing, we manage 11 contacts and successfully activate the park.
POTA is one of the most enjoyable and accessible sides of amateur radio, and hopefully this video shows that you don't need expensive equipment or years of experience to get out and have a go.

🎙️ Radio: Xiegu G90
📡 Power: 20W
🪫 Setup: Telescopic HF whip antenna
📍 Location: Henlow Millennium Meadow (GB-6101)

👉 Subscribe for more approachable amateur radio adventures!

Website: RADIOFORUS.CO.UK
Email: Tom@radioforus.co.uk
Discord: https://discord.gg/YTqnrUMDyT

snippet.title: The Truth About Ham Radio Coax
snippet.description:
There is no such thing as the “perfect” coax. Everything depends on the application.

In this video I go through the coax I use for:
- patch leads
- portable operation
- permanent HF installations
- direct-bury runs
- low-loss feeder
- hardline

We also discuss:
- coax loss in the real world
- why 3 dB isn’t always a disaster
- reading coax spec sheets
- bend radius and durability
- branded vs unbranded coax
- connector losses
- HF vs VHF/UHF considerations

Featuring discussion on:
- Messi & Paoloni
- Ultraflex 7
- Hyperflex / ExtraFlex Bury
- Ecoflex 15
- LDF4-50 hardline
- RG58
- RG213

The goal here is practical engineering - not internet mythology.

73,
Callum M0MCX

snippet.title: Radioddity HF-010: Geniale Portabelantenne oder Schrott?
snippet.description:
Taugt das Radioddity HF-010 Antennenset wirklich für Kurzwelle von 80m bis 6m? 🗺️ In diesem Video mache ich den ehrlichen SWR-Praxistest der Portabelantenne für Amateurfunk und CB-Funk. Vom Unboxing über das mitgelieferte Zubehör bis hin zum kritischen Fazit – so schlägt sie sich im Feld.

Ein komplettes Antennensystem inklusive Standfuß, Radials, 10m Koaxialkabel und BNC-Adapter für einen schmalen Taler klingt verlockend. Doch wie gut funktioniert die mechanische Anpassung auf den Low Bands wie 40m oder gar 80m? Wir messen das SWR auf fast allen wichtigen Bändern durch und schauen uns den Aufbau für die High Bands (15m bis 6m) sowie den Umbau für die längeren Wellen im Detail an.

Wenn dir das Video gefällt, freue ich mich über einen 👍 Daumen nach oben und ein 🔔 Abo für mehr Technik-Tests rund um den Amateurfunk.

snippet.title: I won't even test it!
snippet.description:
Can a radio send pictures without cell service? Yep. That's what first got me excited about the Alervites AT2.

Get $10 Off Your First Flexible PCB Order (Starting at $2):
👉 JLCPCB Link: https://jlcpcb.com/resources/flexible-pcb?&from=TemporarilyOffline
👉 Alervites AT2: https://geni.us/Ww3jkA
👉 My TOADs Digital Interfaces: https://temporarilyoffline.com

But the deeper I dug, the more questions I had. Proprietary digital modes, unclear interoperability, questionable legality across multiple radio services, and a design that makes independent testing more difficult than it should be.

In this video, I take a closer look at the Alervites AT2, explore what makes it interesting, and explain why I wanted to love this radio... but ultimately can't recommend it.

snippet.title: SOTA W7A/CO-055 4F Benchmark
snippet.description:
This summit was activated on December 28, 2024 

This is the northern most  summit in the Dragoon Mountains.

Park near the ruins of the Butterfield stage station and the Confederate graves (links below)

I have left the cw contacts essentially unedited. I did remove long breaks, random stuff and long strings of "CQ" and other boring stuff. If for some reason anyone that might watch these videos wants all the unedited stuff, let me know in the comments and I will put up some other videos of just raw contacts.

I didn't include code translation because I didn't think it would actually matter, you either know code or you don't. If that translation is something you are interested, let me know in the comments and I will add it.

For those interested in old west history, here are some links to videos about the area. Many of these are multipart videos, so I am only going to post links to the first part.

Dragoon Springs
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=142v1l1jmsQ

snippet.title: Cerro San Cristobal Two Ways | South America Summits on the Air
snippet.description:
Two ways to activate Cerro San Cristobal (CE3/SA-019). Option 1: Hike the Road/Trail up. Option 2: Take the Funicular. Which option would you take? 
It was a blast activating this summit in Chile once in 2025 and once in 2026. Thanks to all the North American Chasers who helped me activate! 73!

snippet.title: Sometimes Failures Are the Most Beautiful - SOTA/POTA in Rocky Mountain National Park
snippet.description:
Not every activation goes according to plan — and sometimes that's okay.
This was my first portable activation with the zBITX v2, a brand new QRP radio I'm still getting to know. I hiked into Rocky Mountain National Park via the East Portal Trail, activated Emerald Mountain (W0C/FR-058) for SOTA and RMNP (US-0059) for POTA, and tried everything I had — 2m, 70cm, 20m SSB, and FT8 — all at QRP power levels. I spotted myself. I waited. I listened.
Zero contacts.
But here's the thing: the mountain didn't care. The views were stunning, the air was clear, and somewhere between the frustration and the silence, I remembered why I do this in the first place.
Sometimes the failures are the most beautiful.
In this video:

Dual SOTA/POTA activation attempt at Rocky Mountain National Park
First field outing with the zBITX v2 QRP radio
2m / 70cm FM, 20m SSB, and FT8 — what I tried and what happened
Honest reflections on QRP operating and what I'd do differently

📍 SOTA: W0C/FR-058 — Emerald Mountain
📍 POTA: US-0059 — Rocky Mountain National Park
📻 Radio: zBITX v2 | QRP
73 de W5KV — Signal Trek

snippet.title: "Não vai apagar os 66 dias na cadeia": Idoso preso injustamente entra na Justiça por reparação
snippet.description:
“É muito triste tu ser levado da tua casa sem entender nada, passar 66 dias na cadeia, com muita dificuldade… eu fiquei doente, emagreci 11 quilos.” É assim que o técnico em enfermagem aposentado João Batista Fernandes, agora com 68 anos, lembra do período em que foi preso após ter sua CNH utilizada por uma quadrilha de roubo de caminhões.

Embora o caso tenha sido arquivado pela justiça no dia 26 de maio, com decisão assinada pelo juiz Ricardo Petry Andrade, do tribunal de Justiça do Rio Grande do Sul (TJ/RS), a história não acabou. Ele e o advogado, Adriano Oliveira, comentam que pretendem entrar com ação indenizatória buscando reparação pelos prejuízos causados pela situação.

O arquivamento traz alívio, mas João destaca que jamais irá esquecer o dia 11 de setembro de 2025, quando foi levado como suspeito pela Operação Truck Hunters, deflagrada naquela época pela Polícia Civil.

O profissional informa que a ação deve ser ajuizada até o final da próxima semana. Procurada, a Polícia Penal mantém o posicionamento anterior de que João teve acesso a atendimento médico, além de assistência social e jurídica. A Polícia Civil, por sua vez, afirma que não está se posicionando acerca da decisão judicial.

Reportagem: @_amandakrohn | Amanda Krohn

snippet.title: Power Does Not Matter On GMRS & Ham Radio Hand-Held Radios And I Will Prove it
snippet.description:
If you like the Baofeng UV-5G Plus that I used in this video you can get one here: https://amzn.to/3QjSKCe
In this Mythbusters episode I myth-bust the myth that many online "experts" love to spread, that "power matters" - basically claiming that the more power your GMRS radio handheld 70cm amateur radio (like a Baofeng UV-5R ) transmits, the stronger your signal will be and the more farz (longer range) the radio will transmit.  
I used Ai and scientific experiments to prove that radio-power and RF output on your handheld ham radio and GMRS HT radio does not matter.

snippet.title: Before the Pebble HF Drops — The Original Deep Dive Replay | Kids Table Live
snippet.description:
🔁 The Pebble HF is almost here — and this is the episode where it all began.

We're replaying one of our most popular Kids Table livestreams: the full deep dive 
into the Pebble HF, a $50 open-source, ultra-portable single-band HF QRP kit radio 
that's been turning heads in the ham radio community.

Whether you're already on the waitlist or just hearing about it for the first time — 
this is the breakdown you need before it launches.

📻 What's covered in this episode:
• The origin story — from a $15 Pixie disaster to a real, usable kit radio
• Build time: 40–50 minutes, beginner-friendly soldering project
• Power options: 9V battery, USB-C (5V), or 7–14V — only 4.68 oz
• Open-source USDX-based firmware with CW-specific features
• Price target: ~$50, kit-only, with huge club group build potential
• The first ever Pebble-to-Pebble QSO on the air

🔗 Pebble HF info & sign-up: https://pebblehf.com
🔗 Watch the original stream: https://youtube.com/live/3iJXNHS2BHc
🎙️ Featuring: Mike N4FFF, Becky N4BKY (Ham Radio Duo), Thomas K4SWL

📢 New to the Kids Table? Join us live for ham radio gear deep dives, 
portable operations, and the POTA community every week.

#hamradio #PebbleHF #QRP #HamRadioKidsTable #portableradio #POTA #kitradio #newrelease

snippet.description:
Free Video Course - The Top 5 Beginner Ham Radio Frustrations (and How To Overcome Them): https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/free

Want to talk to ham radio operators around the world without needing an expensive radio? The EchoLink app is your answer! In this quick tutorial, I'll show you how to download, set up, and start using EchoLink on your phone or computer to connect with internet-linked repeaters and ham enthusiasts everywhere. Get ready to expand your ham radio horizons!

snippet.title: ATS Mini V4: Pequeno no Tamanho, Grande na Recepção
snippet.description:
Link para o ATS Mini V4:
https://s.click.aliexpress.com/e/_c3vTRVNX

Link para o XHDATA D219 que comentei no vídeo:
https://s.click.aliexpress.com/e/_c41naZvX

O ATS Mini V4 é um daqueles equipamentos que chamam a atenção pelo tamanho, mas será que ele entrega uma boa experiência para rádio escuta?

Neste vídeo faço uma análise completa do ATS Mini V4, mostrando sua construção, funcionalidades e, principalmente, testes reais de recepção em FM, AM e Ondas Curtas. Também compartilho minha opinião sobre sua utilidade para radioescutas, radioamadores, entusiastas de comunicações e para quem busca alternativas de acesso à informação sem depender da internet.

📻 Neste vídeo você verá:
• Visão geral do ATS Mini V4
• Qualidade de construção e portabilidade
• Testes de recepção em diferentes bandas
• Desempenho em Ondas Curtas
• Pontos positivos e negativos
• Vale a pena para rádio escuta?
• Aplicações para preparação e contingência

Se você gosta de rádio, comunicações, preparação, sobrevivencialismo, radioamadorismo ou simplesmente quer conhecer novas formas de receber informações, este vídeo é para você.

snippet.title: It Is Against The Law To Say These Words On Your Two-Way Radio! (Amateur Radio, GMRS, CB Radio)
snippet.description:
According to FCC laws and regulations, there are several words that you cannot say over the air while using a ham radio (amateur radio), GMRS radio, FRS Radio or a CB Radio (this applies if you have a Baofeng radio). In this video I review the list of words that the FCC will not allow you to transmit over the air and I offer alternative words that you can use instead.

snippet.title: अमेरिका का ग्लोबल लाइसेंस राज! 😡🇮🇳 America Dictating The World? #shorts #geopolitics
snippet.description:
क्या अमेरिका अब भी खुद को दुनिया का 'मालिक' समझता है? 😡

इस वीडियो में देखिए कैसे US Senate की मीटिंग में मार्को रुबियो (Marco Rubio) और अन्य अधिकारी US Sanctions और General License पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं। अमेरिका दुनिया को यह बताने की कोशिश कर रहा है कि कौन सा देश किससे तेल (Oil) खरीदेगा और किससे नहीं।

लेकिन भारत और 'ग्लोबल साउथ' (Global South) के देश जो कॉलोनियलिज्म (Colonialism) और सदियों की गुलामी से लड़कर आज़ाद हुए हैं, वे अब इस "ग्लोबल लाइसेंस राज" (Global License Raj) को नहीं मानेंगे! भारत की स्वतंत्र विदेश नीति (Independent Foreign Policy) आज पूरी दुनिया के लिए एक मिसाल है। 🇮🇳

📌 इस वीडियो में आप जानेंगे: ✔️ US Sanctions और Waivers का असली सच ✔️ अमेरिका की 'लाइसेंस राज' वाली मानसिकता ✔️ भारत और ग्लोबल साउथ का कड़ा स्टैंड

अगर आप भी मानते हैं कि भारत को अपनी विदेश नीति खुद तय करनी चाहिए, तो वीडियो को LIKE करें और अपने दोस्तों के साथ SHARE करें! आपकी इस मुद्दे पर क्या राय है? COMMENT करके ज़रूर बताएं। 👇

🔥 ऐसी ही बेहतरीन Geopolitical Case Studies और Current Affairs के लिए चैनल को SUBSCRIBE करें! 🔔

Truck driving is an immensely rewarding career choice that offers individuals a unique blend of independence, responsibility, and financial stability. Obtaining a Commercial Driver's License (CDL) is the first crucial step toward entering the trucking industry, opening doors to a plethora of opportunities. With a CDL in hand, aspiring truckers embark on a journey that goes beyond mere transportation; it's a lifestyle that involves navigating the open road, connecting communities, and ensuring the seamless flow of goods across the nation. In the world of trucking, a CDL is not just a license but a passport to a diverse array of experiences. The demand for skilled drivers continues to rise, making truck driving a dynamic and secure profession. The essence of trucking lies not just in the movement of cargo but in the sense of accomplishment derived from overcoming challenges on the road. Trucking, with its CDL prerequisite, offers a fulfilling career where individuals become the backbone of the economy, driving progress with every mile.

snippet.title: Only a Licensed HVAC Contractor Can Clean Upstream Evaporator Coils
snippet.description:
Many homeowners assume air duct cleaning only involves cleaning the supply and return ducts. However, one of the most important areas of the entire HVAC system is often overlooked—the upstream side of the evaporator coil.

During a recent air duct cleaning project in Parker, Colorado, Eagle River Service Company used an inspection camera to examine the evaporator coil and discovered a buildup of hair, dust, and debris restricting airflow through the system.

This is a perfect example of why homeowners should hire a licensed HVAC contractor—not just a duct cleaning company.

snippet.title: US License Warning To Modi Govt: End to Russian Oil Waiver? | Satya Hindi News Bulletin
snippet.description:
अमेरिकी विदेश मंत्री मार्को रुबियो ने भारत को रूस से तेल खरीदने के लिए मिली छूट (License) को जल्द खत्म करने की चेतावनी दी है, जिस पर देश में संप्रभुता को लेकर बहस छिड़ गई है।

US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that Washington aims to terminate the general license allowing India to purchase Russian oil "as soon as possible," sparking a debate in India over strategic autonomy and energy security.

Key Highlights of the Bulletin:

Testifying before the Senate on June 2, Marco Rubio confirmed that the Trump administration wants to end time-limited waivers for Russian oil. India, which imported 1.9 million barrels per day from Russia in May 2026 (a 23% jump), maintains that its sourcing is dictated by the needs of its 1.4 billion people.

Rahul Gandhi has labeled the transfer of CBSE Chairman Rahul Singh and Secretary Himanshu Gupta as a "cover-up" to protect Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan. He demanded a judicial inquiry into the On-Screen Marking (OSM) scandal affecting 18.5 lakh students.

Former CM Mamata Banerjee held a sit-in at Esplanade on June 2, vowing to fight the BJP "till her last breath." She alleged that TMC MLAs are being threatened by police to prevent them from attending party meetings and announced plans for a country-wide action plan.

snippet.title: CVS Pharmacy Technician Lost Job and License after Secret Service Raid Found
snippet.description:
In 2015, Nicole Yvonne Flores — a seven-year CVS pharmacy technician at the Imperial Beach branch in San Diego, California — was terminated from her position and had her license suspended by the California State Board of Pharmacy under Business and Professions Code §494, charged with three causes for discipline including committing an act of dishonesty, fraud, and deceit, general unprofessional conduct, and direct violation of the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act, after a Secret Service raid on her apartment conducted in connection with a separate financial-crime investigation discovered the physical prescription records of approximately 100 CVS patients in her personal possession. Investigators matched the physical records found in her residence to timestamped, credential-linked access logs from CVS's own pharmacy systems, confirming that Flores had queried each patient profile using her employee login during the course of her normal shifts. The California State Board of Pharmacy suspended her license pending a full investigation, with permanent revocation considered highly probable, and Flores faces anticipated civil liability including reimbursement of all investigation and enforcement costs. Among the approximately 100 victims whose protected health information was removed from the controlled-access environment where HIPAA law required it to remain was an elderly regular customer who had filled blood-pressure prescriptions at the Imperial Beach branch for years, trusting that her medical profile would never leave those walls.

- - -
Disclaimer: This video is a dramatization based on real events. Some visual content was created with artificial intelligence assistance. Some details have been fictionalized and all names have been changed to protect the privacy of those involved.

snippet.title: Summit Snapshot | Mount Victoria (VK7)
snippet.description:
Join me on a drone reconnaissance flight over Mount Victoria (VK7/NE‑007) in Tasmania — part of the SOTA (Summits on the Air) series.
This short video captures the rugged beauty of the summit from above, showing the terrain, access routes, and activation zone for amateur radio operators planning their own ascent.

You’ll see:

Aerial footage highlighting the summit’s rocky ridges and vegetation

Key visual markers for navigation and setup

A quick overview of elevation, coordinates, and approach notes

Peaceful drone shots designed to help activators and hikers visualize the area before heading out

Whether you’re a SOTA activator, hiker, or simply love Tasmanian landscapes, this snapshot gives a clear, practical look at one of the state’s most striking peaks

snippet.title: One Year, One RV, Endless POTA Activations
snippet.description:
Free Video Course - The Top 5 Beginner Ham Radio Frustrations (and How To Overcome Them): https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/free

In about six weeks, my wife and I are leaving Texas in our RV for a full year on the road — and I'm going to do as many Parks on the Air activations as I possibly can along the way. This is the beginning of Parks on the Road.

From Texas up to the Great Lakes, across New England, down to the Florida Keys, through the Southwest, and eventually to Colorado — wherever we go, if there's a park to activate, I'll be setting up the HF rig and getting on the air. And I'm filming all of it.

In this video I share why I'm doing this, where we're headed, the gear I'm bringing, and what it means for this channel. The tutorials and how-to content you're here for aren't going anywhere — but now there's a whole new series riding alongside them.

If you want to follow the journey, subscribe and hit the bell (uploads won't always be on a regular schedule once we're on the road), and join the Parks on the Road email list to know where we are and what's coming next.

▶ Parks on the Road playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLwhBxy-l2D1Vr_QWXIRUH_YBAUhqZsZhS

✉ Follow the journey — email updates: https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/parks-on-the-road-updates/

Gear mentioned in this video:
• Yaesu FT-710 HF transceiver: https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/yaesu-ft710
• Bioenno battery: https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/bioenno-blf1215a
• Buddistick Pro antenna: https://hamradiolaunchpad.com/buddistick-pro

Timestamps:
0:31 — The announcement
1:27 — How I got into ham radio
2:48 — Where we're going
4:34 — The gear I'm bringing
5:23 — What this means for the channel
7:39 — Why this matters

73, and I'll see you on the air. — Donnie, KD0JYV

snippet.title: First SOTA activation on Scooter Peak W5N/SE-021 and POTA activation in Vellas Caldera US-0678
snippet.description:
Welcome to my first Summits on the Air (SOTA) activation video!
On May 30, 2026, I completed my very first SOTA activation from Scooter Peak, W5N/SE-021, located in the beautiful Jemez Mountains of northern New Mexico. This activation was also a Parks on the Air (POTA) activation and turned into a valuable learning experience.
While calling CQ, I mistakenly identified the park as Santa Fe National Forest, US-4517. A fellow SOTA activator kindly corrected me and informed me that the location I was actually operating from was Valles Caldera National Preserve, US-0678. After realizing the error, I had my original POTA log removed and submitted a corrected log for US-0678, which included the 30 contacts I made during the activation.
I would also like to apologize to any activators or hunters who logged our contact as a Park-to-Park using US-4517. To receive proper credit, you may need to resubmit your log using the correct park designation, US-0678. I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused and appreciate everyone's understanding.
Scooter Peak sits at a unique location, bordered by Valles Caldera National Preserve to the north, Santa Fe National Forest to the south, and Bandelier National Monument to the east. The hike to the summit was approximately one mile and featured rocky terrain, steep sections, and numerous fallen trees. Evidence of the 2011 Las Conchas Fire, which burned over 156,000 acres, is still visible throughout the area.
For this activation, I used a Yaesu FT-891 with an antenna tuner, two 4.5 Ah batteries, a Chameleon 1040 EFHW antenna, and a traditional paper log for recording contacts. Conditions on the summit included winds gusting up to 10 miles per hour, but the effort was rewarded with spectacular views of Valles Caldera and Bandelier.
The area is rich in vegetation, including New Mexico locust, Rocky Mountain maple, blue spruce, common juniper, and Douglas fir. In this video, you'll hear audio from some of my QSOs and see photos I captured around the summit and throughout my time exploring the Jemez Springs area.
Thank you for watching, and I hope you enjoy following along on my first SOTA activation adventure. If you were one of the operators I contacted during this activation, thank you for helping make my first SOTA experience a success.

snippet.title: You need a license to cut hair.
snippet.description:
In this episode of Beyond The Bay Podcast, I sit down with Kevin Roberts, President of Roberts Repair Inc, to discuss technician standards, mechanical education, shop culture, and the dangerous gap between modern vehicle complexity and workforce competency.

Modern vehicles are packed with physics, engineering, electronics, and safety systems.

Yet somehow. We’ve normalized the idea that “working in a shop for a year” qualifies someone to repair life-critical systems.

That should scare people.

Brakes. Steering. Emergency vehicles.

Half-million-dollar trucks. These aren’t hobbies.

They’re systems people trust with their lives every single day.

The best technicians understand more than parts replacement.

🎧 Listen to the full episode on @petercooperAC

Then he discovered Ham Radio Prep's General License course.

snippet.title: Dual Op activation at US-10562 with Joe, NJ9L.  What a blast!
snippet.description:
Joe, NJ9L, contacted me and said he would be in the area and asked if I was up for a Dual Operator activation.  And, of course I said yes.  
We met at my home park, US-10562. One thing I love about the Ham Radio community is the way it brings people together.  Here's a Louisiana boy meeting a New Jersey guy for the very first time and our common interest breaks down any barriers and it's instantly like we've known each other for years.
We deployed the @SPOOLTENNA Parks Model 4010 EFHW and Joes POTA Challenger.  Starting on the EFHW, the contacts were fast and furious.  The QSB started to creep in and we made the change to the Challenger toward the end of the activation.  
If ever you have a chance to do a multi operator activation, I highly recommend it.  It's just pure fun.
Thank you Joe!  It was a blast.
